message:
ci(release): enable aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu binary target

The ARM Linux target was disabled due to OpenSSL cross-compilation concerns,
but git2 already uses vendored-openssl and reqwest uses rustls, so the
blocker is resolved. Add CC/CXX env vars for ring crate cross-compilation.

Fixes Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup#115

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -88,11 +88,10 @@ jobs:
           #   os: ubuntu-latest
           #   archive: tar.gz
           #   cross: false
-          # DISABLED: ARM Linux cross-compile requires vendored OpenSSL - see Cargo.toml
-          # - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
-          #   os: ubuntu-latest
-          #   archive: tar.gz
-          #   cross: true
+          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            os: ubuntu-latest
+            archive: tar.gz
+            cross: true
           # DISABLED: x86_64-apple-darwin requires Intel runner (macos-13 retired)
           # or vendored OpenSSL for cross-compilation from ARM
           # - target: x86_64-apple-darwin
@@ -127,6 +126,8 @@ jobs:
           sudo apt-get update
           sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu g++-aarch64-linux-gnu
           echo "CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_GNU_LINKER=aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" >> $GITHUB_ENV
+          echo "CC_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu=aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" >> $GITHUB_ENV
+          echo "CXX_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu=aarch64-linux-gnu-g++" >> $GITHUB_ENV
 
       - name: Install musl tools (Linux musl)
         if: matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
@@ -273,6 +274,13 @@ jobs:
             sudo mv ms /usr/local/bin/
             ```
 
+            **Linux (ARM64/aarch64)**
+            ```bash
+            curl -LO https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/v${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}/ms-${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
+            tar -xzf ms-${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
+            sudo mv ms /usr/local/bin/
+            ```
+
             **Linux (musl/Alpine)**
             ```bash
             curl -LO https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/v${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}/ms-${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz
